text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : U.S. intelligence assessments indicate Iran still has thousands of ballistic missiles and could retrieve launchers from underground storage areas, contradicting U.S. Defence Secretary Hegseth’s claim that Iran’s missile programme is “functionally destroyed”. While more than half of launchers have been destroyed or trapped, many can be repaired or dug out. Iran’s missile inventory has been roughly halved but still numbers in the thousands. Iran also retains a small inventory of cruise missiles. Some officials are concerned Tehran will use the ceasefire to reconstitute its arsenal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：美国情报评估显示，伊朗仍拥有数千枚弹道导弹，并可能从地下储存区取回发射装置，这与美国国防部长赫格塞斯关于伊朗导弹计划已“功能性摧毁”的说法相矛盾。虽然超过一半的发射装置已被摧毁或被困，但许多仍可修复或挖掘出来。伊朗的导弹库存大约减半，但仍有数千枚。伊朗还保留了少量巡航导弹。一些官员担心德黑兰会利用停火来重建其武库。 @wfwitness

text: Muhoozi Kainerugaba, Uganda’s military chief: We are going to end ALL diplomatic relations with Türkiye in the next 30 days if they do not address our issues!
text_zh: 乌干达军事首长穆胡齐·凯内鲁加巴：如果土耳其不解决我们的问题，我们将在未来30天内终止与土耳其的所有外交关系！

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: In the upcoming negotiations, if the American side is ready for a real agreement and to grant the rights of the Iranian nation, they will see readiness for an agreement on our side as well. However, in the current conflict, we have shown them that if they intend to use negotiations as a futile show or a deceptive operation, we are prepared to secure our rights through faith in God and reliance on the capabilities of our nation.
text_zh: 伊朗议长卡利巴夫：在即将到来的谈判中，如果美方准备好达成真正的协议并给予伊朗民族应有的权利，他们也会看到我们达成协议的意愿。然而，在当前的冲突中，我们已经向他们表明，如果他们打算将谈判作为一场徒劳的表演或欺骗性行动，我们已准备好通过信仰上帝和依靠我们民族的能力来捍卫我们的权利。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Unfortunately, our experience with negotiations with the Americans has always been accompanied by failure and breach of commitments. Twice within less than a year, in the middle of negotiations-despite the goodwill of the Iranian side-they attacked us and committed numerous war crimes. We have goodwill, but we do not have trust.
text_zh: 伊朗议长卡利巴夫：不幸的是，我们与美国人谈判的经验总是伴随着失败和违背承诺。在不到一年的时间里，尽管伊朗方面表现出善意，但他们在谈判期间两次袭击我们，并犯下了无数战争罪行。我们有善意，但我们没有信任。

text: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese and Israeli diplomats spoke by phone Friday and are planning to meet next week to discuss a ceasefire, the office of Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said in a social media post. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩的办公室在社交媒体上发文称，黎巴嫩和以色列外交官周五进行了通话，并计划下周会面讨论停火事宜。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Ghalibaf at Islamabad Airport: Our experience negotiating with the United States has always been marked by failure and broken promises / We have goodwill, but no trust The Speaker of Parliament, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, upon arrival in Islamabad and in response to journalists’ questions about recent remarks by U.S. Vice President Vance, said: ➡️ Unfortunately, our experience in negotiations with the United States has consistently been one of failure and broken commitments. Twice within less than a year, in the middle of negotiations—and despite Iran’s goodwill—we were attacked, and multiple war crimes were committed. ➡️ We have goodwill, but we do not have trust. ➡️ In the upcoming negotiations, if the American side is ready for a genuine agreement and to grant the rights of the Iranian people, they will see readiness from us as well. However, in the current conflict, we have shown them that if they intend to use negotiations as a futile show or a deceptive tactic, we are prepared to secure our rights through faith in God and reliance on the strength of our nation. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 卡利巴夫在伊斯兰堡机场：我们与美国谈判的经验总是以失败和违背承诺为标志 / 我们有善意，但没有信任。议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫在抵达伊斯兰堡时，回应记者关于美国副总统万斯近期言论的提问时表示：➡️ 不幸的是，我们与美国谈判的经验始终是失败和违背承诺的。在不到一年的时间里，尽管伊朗表现出善意，但我们在谈判期间两次遭到袭击，并发生了多起战争罪行。 ➡️ 我们有善意，但我们没有信任。 ➡️ 在即将到来的谈判中，如果美方准备好达成真正的协议并给予伊朗人民应有的权利，他们也会看到我们的意愿。然而，在当前的冲突中，我们已经向他们表明，如果他们打算将谈判作为一场徒劳的表演或欺骗性策略，我们已准备好通过信仰上帝和依靠我们民族的力量来捍卫我们的权利。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部2个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: U.S. and Iran talks in Islamabad on Saturday are expected to start indirectly through mediators, then move to direct discussions later in the day. Source: CNN
text_zh: 预计周六在伊斯兰堡举行的美伊会谈将首先通过调解人进行间接接触，随后在当天晚些时候转为直接讨论。来源：CNN

text: Lebanon and the U.S. have asked Israel to pause its strikes ahead of planned talks next week. The U.S. supports the move, but Israel hasn’t agreed yet, with Netanyahu still reviewing it. Source: Axios
text_zh: 黎巴嫩和美国已要求以色列在下周计划的会谈前暂停袭击。美国支持这一举措，但以色列尚未同意，内塔尼亚胡仍在审查中。来源：Axios

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 Trump says the US "doesn't need a backup plan" in case negotiations fail, because of cope. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 "No nuclear weapons" - That's basically the only condition Trump has it seems. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 特朗普表示，由于应对措施，美国在谈判失败的情况下‘不需要备份计划’。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 “没有核武器”——这似乎是特朗普唯一的条件。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on the Strait of Hormuz opening: "Yeah, but that'll open up automatically. Yeah, the answer's yes, but the strait will open up. If we just left, the strait's gonna... otherwise they make no money. So the strait's gonna open. But what we have is no nuclear weapon. But we'll open the strait anyway. Don't forget, we don't use the strait. Other countries use the strait. So we do have other countries coming up and they'll help out." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈及霍尔木兹海峡开放：“是的，但这会自动开放。是的，答案是肯定的，海峡会开放。如果我们只是离开，海峡会……否则他们就赚不到钱。所以海峡会开放。但我们拥有的是没有核武器。但无论如何我们都会开放海峡。别忘了，我们不使用这个海峡。其他国家使用这个海峡。所以我们确实有其他国家会过来帮忙。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Tucker Carlson on Trump: I’ve always liked Trump and still feel sorry for him, as I do for all slaves. He’s hemmed in by other forces. He can’t make his own decisions. It’s awful to watch.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 塔克·卡尔森谈特朗普：我一直很喜欢特朗普，并且仍然为他感到难过，就像我为所有奴隶感到难过一样。他被其他力量束缚住了。他无法做出自己的决定。看着这一切真是太糟糕了。

text: OSINTdefender According to CNN, citing a U.S. official, the U.S.-Iran talks held in Islamabad, Pakistan will be both indirect and direct at the same time. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据CNN援引美国官员的话称，在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡举行的美伊会谈将同时进行间接和直接对话。 推文

text: WarMonitor UMass Lowell/YouGov poll: 57% say life has gotten harder in the past six months, 67% say the country is on the wrong track. 65% say the U.S. is spending too much on the Iran war, 62% oppose ICE facilities locally, and 87% support Epstein-related investigations. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042719104193159442/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 马萨诸塞大学洛厄尔分校/YouGov民调：57%的人表示过去六个月生活变得更加艰难，67%的人表示国家走错了方向。65%的人表示美国在伊朗战争上花费过多，62%的人反对在当地设立ICE设施，87%的人支持与爱泼斯坦相关的调查。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042719104193159442/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Donald Trump stated that a good deal with Iran should include the absence of nuclear weapons. Journalist: What does a good deal look like to you? Donald Trump: The absence of nuclear weapons. That's number one. You know, I think the regime change has already happened, even though we've never had such a... such a criterion. No nuclear weapons. That's what it's all about 99% of the time. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普表示，与伊朗达成的一项好协议应包括没有核武器。记者：对您来说，好的协议是什么样的？唐纳德·特朗普：没有核武器。这是第一位的。你知道，我认为政权更迭已经发生了，尽管我们从未有过这样的……这样的标准。没有核武器。99%的情况下，这就是全部。 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Donald Trump stated that Iran has suffered a military defeat and now the US intends to open the Strait of Hormuz in any case. "They have suffered a military defeat, and now we will open the Gulf with or without them, but it will be opened. We are going to open the strait, as it is called, and I think it will happen quite quickly, and if not — we will be able to bring the matter to a conclusion in one way or another. Everything is going well," emphasized the US President. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普表示，伊朗遭受了军事失败，现在美国打算无论如何都要开放霍尔木兹海峡。“他们遭受了军事失败，现在我们将无论有没有他们都要开放海湾，但它会被开放。我们将开放所谓的这个海峡，我认为这会很快发生，如果不行——我们将能够以某种方式结束这件事。一切进展顺利，”美国总统强调。 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Trump says will not allow tolls in Strait of Hormuz tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：特朗普表示不会允许霍尔木兹海峡收费 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Donald Trump wished Vice President Jay D. Vance good luck before his departure for negotiations with Iran. Journalist: What did you say to Jay D. Vance before his departure, sir? Donald Trump: I wished him good luck. He has an important task ahead. We'll find out what's going on there. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普在副总统杰伊·D·万斯出发前往与伊朗谈判前祝他好运。记者：先生，您在杰伊·D·万斯出发前对他说了什么？唐纳德·特朗普：我祝他好运。他面前有一项重要任务。我们会找出那里发生了什么。 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Images released of the Iranian delegation arriving in Pakistan — Tasnim https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042716314087592219/photo/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced that the 22nd wave of Operation True Promise 4 was carried out this morning under the codename "Ya Hossein ibn Ali." The statement said the new‑generation missiles struck US and Israeli bases in Gulf…" ⚡ 🇶🇦 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Footage released by Al Jazera reveals the damage done by Iranian strikes on the AN/FPS-132 early-warning radar in Qatar. At first glance the damage appears to be moderate. It might be still working due to the scalable nature of radar technology. However the damage done by the fire is unclear. The radar station was attacked in early March. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 伊斯兰革命卫队宣布，‘真实承诺4’行动的第22波攻势于今天上午以‘Ya Hossein ibn Ali’为代号执行。声明称，新一代导弹袭击了海湾地区的美国和以色列基地……” ⚡ 🇶🇦 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 半岛电视台发布的画面揭示了伊朗对卡塔尔AN/FPS-132预警雷达袭击造成的破坏。乍一看，损坏似乎是中度的。由于雷达技术的可扩展性，它可能仍在工作。然而，火灾造成的破坏尚不清楚。该雷达站于3月初遭到袭击。 @wfwitness

text: 🇶🇦 Al Jazeera published exclusive footage of the strikes on Ras Laffan Industrial City, located north of Doha, Qatar. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇶🇦 半岛电视台发布了针对卡塔尔多哈北部拉斯拉凡工业城袭击的独家画面。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reporter: You’re not going to let Iran toll the strait, are you? Trump: We are not gonna let them do it. Nobody knows if they are doing that. If they are doing that, we will not let that happen.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 记者：你不会让伊朗对海峡收费，对吧？特朗普：我们不会让他们这样做。没人知道他们是否在这样做。如果他们在这样做，我们不会让这种情况发生。

text: Tucker Carlson on Trump: I’ve always liked Trump and still feel sorry for him, as I do for all slaves. He’s hemmed in by other forces. He can’t make his own decisions. It’s awful to watch. Source: Newsmax
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森谈特朗普：我一直很喜欢特朗普，并且仍然为他感到难过，就像我为所有奴隶感到难过一样。他被其他力量束缚住了。他无法做出自己的决定。看着这一切真是太糟糕了。来源：Newsmax

text: Trump: We have other countries coming up to help with the Strait of Hormuz. We will have that open fairly soon.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们有其他国家会过来帮忙处理霍尔木兹海峡。我们很快就会把它开放。

text: Reporter: What does a good deal look like for you? Trump: No nuclear weapon, number one. I think it has already been regime change—we never had that as a criteria. No nuclear weapon—that is 99% of it.
text_zh: 记者：对您来说，好的协议是什么样的？特朗普：没有核武器，第一位。我认为政权更迭已经发生了——我们从未将其作为标准。没有核武器——这就是99%的内容。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 Qatari radars heavily damaged after Iranian drone strikes.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 卡塔尔雷达在伊朗无人机袭击后严重受损。

text: 🇶🇦 U.S. AN/FPS-132 early-warning missile radar system, featured in the On the Front Line documentary by Al Jazeera. ℹ️ Reposted, because we translated the video. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇶🇦 美国AN/FPS-132导弹预警雷达系统，出现在半岛电视台的《前线》纪录片中。 ℹ️ 已重新发布，因为我们翻译了视频。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: We are not doing much talking.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们没有进行太多交谈。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ Speaker of Iranian Parliament Mohammed Bagher Ghalibaf: "My companions on this flight #Minab168 " .
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 伊朗议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫：“我这次航班的同伴 #米纳布168”。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: My companions on this flight.
text_zh: 伊朗议长卡利巴夫：我这次航班的同伴。

text: Reporter: What is your backup plan if there is no deal? Trump: You don’t need a backup plan.
text_zh: 记者：如果没有达成协议，您的备份计划是什么？特朗普：你不需要备份计划。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump says they will open the strait "one way or the other" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普表示他们将“以某种方式”开放海峡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: The Strait of Hormuz will open up automatically… Otherwise, they make no money. We will open the strait anyway.
text_zh: 特朗普：霍尔木兹海峡会自动开放……否则，他们就赚不到钱。无论如何，我们都会开放海峡。

text: Reporter: You’re not going to let Iran toll the strait, are you? Trump: We are not gonna let them do it. Nobody knows if they are doing that. If they are doing that, we will not let that happen.
text_zh: 记者：你不会让伊朗对海峡收费，对吧？特朗普：我们不会让他们这样做。没人知道他们是否在这样做。如果他们在这样做，我们不会让这种情况发生。

text: Trump: The Strait will be open.
text_zh: 特朗普：海峡将会开放。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The Iranian delegation in Pakistan.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 在巴基斯坦的伊朗代表团。

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Images released of the Iranian delegation arriving in Pakistan, their delegation is named Minab 168 — Tasnim https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042710759902171490/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯——伊朗代表团抵达巴基斯坦的图像发布，他们的代表团名为“米纳布168” —— 塔斯尼姆通讯社 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042710759902171490/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical New image of the damage caused by an Iranian drone attack on the AN/FPS-132 ballistic missile early warning radar in Qatar. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042709913919533437/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗无人机袭击卡塔尔AN/FPS-132弹道导弹预警雷达造成破坏的新图像。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042709913919533437/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index 🇺🇸 JD Vance has a 38% chance of becoming the Republican Party's presidential nominee for 2028, compared to 24% for Marco Rubio, according to prediction market @Kalshi . https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042709091680923935/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 🇺🇸 根据预测市场 @Kalshi 的数据，JD·万斯成为2028年共和党总统候选人的几率为38%，而马可·卢比奥为24%。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042709091680923935/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan's army chief Gen. Asim Munir and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar received a high-level Iranian delegation in Islamabad led by parliament speaker Bagher Ghalibaf and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042708338350149654/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔将军和外交部长伊沙克·达尔在伊斯兰堡接待了由议长巴盖尔·卡利巴夫和外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希率领的高级别伊朗代表团。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042708338350149654/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor So here's an American President offering to use U.S. taxpayer dollars to prop up an authoritarian ally, who also happens to be another of Putin’s puppets. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042707682004512868/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 所以，这是一位美国总统提议使用美国纳税人的钱来支持一个威权盟友，而这个盟友恰好又是普京的另一个傀儡。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042707682004512868/photo/1 推文
